game_info.title: Voxel Venture
game_info.concept:
Dive into an open world of building, crafting and survival. Gather resources, survive the night, and build whatever you can imagine one block at a time. Explore and craft your way through a completely open world where you can play with friends, build a city, start a farm, mine deep into the ground, face mysterious enemies, or just experiment to the limits of your imagination! 

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/minecraft-dream-it-build-it/id479516143

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Dive into an open world of building, crafting and survival. Gather resources, survive the night, and build whatever you can imagine one block at a time. Explore and craft your way through a completely open world where you can play with friends, build a city, start a farm, mine deep into the ground, face mysterious enemies, or just experiment to the limits of your imagination! 
 
The possibilities are endless. Embark on an epic adventure and play with friends, building from the ground up. Build and expand in Creative mode, where you can craft from unlimited resources. Survive the night, face intense battles, craft tools, and fend off danger in Survival mode. With seamless cross-platform and multiplayer gameplay on Minecraft: Bedrock Edition, you can adventure solo or with friends, and discover an infinite, randomly generated world filled with blocks to mine, biomes to explore, and mobs to befriend (or battle)!  
 
In Minecraft, the world is yours to shape! 
 
CREATE YOUR WORLD 
• Build anything from the ground up 
• Craft from special resources and tools to create brand new structures and landscapes 
• Explore an endless open world full of different biomes and creatures 
• Minecraft Marketplace – Get creator-made add-ons, thrilling worlds, and stylish cosmetics on Minecraft Marketplace 
• Connect with millions of players on community servers, or subscribe to Realms Plus to cross-play with up to 10 friends on your own private server 
• Slash commands – Tweak how the game plays: you can change the weather, summon mobs, change the time of day, and more 
• Add-ons – Customize your experience even further with add-ons! If you're more tech-inclined, you can modify your game to create new resource packs 
 
MULTIPLAYER ONLINE GAMES 
• Join free massive multiplayer servers and play with thousands of others 
• Multiplayer servers allow you to play with up to 4 players online with a free Xbox Live account 
• Build, battle and explore other realms. With Realms and Realms Plus, you can play with up to 10 friends cross-platform, anytime, anywhere on Realms, your own private server that we host for you 
• With Realms Plus, get instant access to over 150 Marketplace items with new additions each month. Share with friends on your own private Realms server*  
• Connect and play with players across the world, wherever they are, and join in on MMO battles for survival in other worlds 
• Discover gigantic community-run worlds, compete in unique mini-games and socialize in lobbies full of fellow Minecrafters 
 
SUPPORT: https://www.minecraft.net/help 
LEARN MORE: https://www.minecraft.net/ 

Here are the links to our Privacy Policy and Terms and Conditions:
Privacy Policy: https://www.minecraft.net/privacy/gdpr
Terms and Conditions: https://account.mojang.com/terms
 
MINIMUM RECOMMENDED SPECIFICATION 
 
To check the requirements for your device visit: https://help.minecraft.net/hc/en-us/articles/4409172223501 
 
*Realms & Realms Plus: Try a free 30-day trial in-app. 

Minecraft may request the following optional permissions, which require your consent. You can continue to use Minecraft without granting these permissions; however, some features may be limited or unavailable.
For more information, please see below:
• Local Network: To find other devices on the same Wi‑Fi network for multiplayer gameplay.
• App Tracking: To deliver personalized ads and improve application experience
game_info.description: Welcome to Voxel Venture, a 2D procedural sandbox survival game. You have been dropped into an unknown world filled with resources, mysteries, and dangers. Your objective is to explore the terrain, mine blocks to gather materials, build a shelter to survive the night, and dig deep into the earth to find the legendary "Blue Core" artifact. Managing your health and selecting the right tools for the job is essential for survival.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Move the player laterally
Arrow Up/Down: Aim tool or block placement vertically
Space: Jump
Shift: Cycle through the inventory hotbar
Z: Use current item (Mine block / Place block / Attack enemy)
ENTER: Start the game from the main menu
ESC: Pause or Unpause the game
R: Restart the game from the Game Over screen

TEST_1.test_description: Verify player gravity and terrain collision physics.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The test will simulate a jump action (Space) and lateral movement (Right Arrow) to ensure the player rises, falls, and lands on solid ground without passing through blocks.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player Y position decreases (jump), then increases (fall), and stabilizes at a specific Y coordinate corresponding to the terrain surface. Velocity resets to 0 upon landing.
TEST_1.description: Verify player gravity and terrain collision physics.

TEST_1.expected: Player Y position decreases (jump), then increases (fall), and stabilizes at a specific Y coordinate corresponding to the terrain surface. Velocity resets to 0 upon landing.

TEST_2.test_description: Test block mining mechanics and inventory updates.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The test will move the player adjacent to a mineable block, select the pickaxe (Shift), and repeatedly press Z to break the block.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The target block in the world grid changes to empty/air. The player's inventory count for that block type increases by 1.
TEST_2.description: Test block mining mechanics and inventory updates.
TEST_2.strategy: The test will move the player adjacent to a mineable block, select the pickaxe (Shift), and repeatedly press Z to break the block.
TEST_2.expected: The target block in the world grid changes to empty/air. The player's inventory count for that block type increases by 1.

TEST_3.strategy_description: The test will switch to a block slot in the inventory and press Z while aiming at an empty space to place the block.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The empty grid cell changes to the selected block type. The player's inventory count for that block type decreases by 1.
TEST_3.strategy: The test will switch to a block slot in the inventory and press Z while aiming at an empty space to place the block.
TEST_3.expected: The empty grid cell changes to the selected block type. The player's inventory count for that block type decreases by 1.

TEST_4.test_description: Test enemy interaction and combat system.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Spawn a test enemy near the player. The test will simulate player attacks (Z) while facing the enemy.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: The enemy entity takes damage, flashes or knocks back, and eventually is removed from the `gameState.entities` array upon death.
TEST_4.description: Test enemy interaction and combat system.
TEST_4.strategy: Spawn a test enemy near the player. The test will simulate player attacks (Z) while facing the enemy.
TEST_4.expected: The enemy entity takes damage, flashes or knocks back, and eventually is removed from the `gameState.entities` array upon death.

TEST_5.test_description: Verify game win condition (Finding the Core).
TEST_5.strategy_description: Cheat the player position to be right next to the "Blue Core" block and simulate the mining action to destroy it.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: The `gameState.gamePhase` transitions to "GAME_OVER_WIN" immediately upon the destruction of the Core block.
TEST_5.description: Verify game win condition (Finding the Core).
TEST_5.strategy: Cheat the player position to be right next to the "Blue Core" block and simulate the mining action to destroy it.
TEST_5.expected: The `gameState.gamePhase` transitions to "GAME_OVER_WIN" immediately upon the destruction of the Core block.
